title: pow.rs: STALENESS_WINDOW_SECS=600 does not match actual ±659s effective window
description: core/src/pow.rs:176 checks now_floor.abs_diff(ts_floor as u64) > 10 where both values are unix_time/60 (minute floors). The effective window is up to 10 full minutes plus up to 59 seconds of rounding in each direction = up to 659 seconds, not the 600 indicated by STALENESS_WINDOW_SECS. The constant is misleading. Fix: add a comment explaining the floor-based approximation and the actual effective range.
